title: Domain-entry gate spec + Phase-3 ingestion readiness audit
problem: The master alignment audit (ticket-084) found the engine is mock/fixture-complete but real research has not started. Before implementing the first real manual source ingestion (ticket-086), we need a focused, read-only readiness audit that defines the domain-entry gates G1-G6, inventories real vs stub ingestion paths, and returns an explicit GO/NO-GO for ticket-086 with the exact minimal implementation target.
evidence: tests/golden/test_01_ingestion.py (ingest persists source+chunks, idempotent, survives restart)
rge/llm/mock_client.py (extract_claims loads canned fixture, not real text)
acceptance_criteria: Readiness report exists with explicit GO or NO-GO for ticket-086.
Report inventories real vs stub ingestion paths (ingest CLI, fetcher, parser, repos, source_discovery, fetcher.fetch_source, candidate_ranker).
Report assesses gates G1-G6 with current status and minimal missing proof each.
Report defines the exact minimal ticket-086 implementation target and acceptance criteria.

Report defines first real source format (.txt/.md; PDF/URL deferred), local source location (gitignored data/sources/manual/creativity/), determinism proof, no-export-leak proof, and no-model-authority proof.
No ingestion implemented; no validators changed; no OpenAI/cloud; no broad docs cleanup; no private source files committed.
non_goals: Do not implement manual ingestion (that is ticket-086).
Do not change validators or extraction logic.
Do not do broad docs cleanup or another master audit.
Do not commit private local source files.
